Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 21-specific APIs or strict compiler checks.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiled bytecode is compatible with the target Java version (21) and enforces API usage restrictions.
